item.title: Contact
item.description: Email: foo@xyz.com Phone: +91-123123 Mailing Address 221B, Baker Street London United Kingdom Social Facebook Twitter Google+

item.title: Jacob Wynne
item.description: About Me I am a resident physician exploring artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions in radiation oncology. Favorite Resources Arxiv Sanity Preserver Learn X in Y Minutes Numpy for MATLAB Users Publications In chronological order: Newman AM, Bratman SV, To J, Wynne JF, Eclov NCW, Modlin LA, Liu CL, Neal JW, Wakelee HA, Merritt RE, Shrager JB, Loo BL, Alizadeh AA, Diehn M.
